//note: 每个 round_id 对应一个 Sprint 轮次
//current_state_enum: ROUND_CREATED | PLANNING | DEVELOPMENT | RELEASING | PROMOTING | JUDGING | ROUND_CLOSED

//round_to_team.PLANNING: 检查 product 是否全部结束
//round_to_team.DEVELOPMENT: 检查 dev 是否全部结束
//round_to_team.RELEASING: 检查 devops 是否全部结束
//round_to_team.PROMOTING: 检查 growth 是否全部结束
//round_to_team.JUDGING: 检查 judge 是否完成

//team_completion_logic: team 某个角色的结束 = completed / failed / skipped 均视为该角色已结束。只有 in_progress 和 pending 视为未结束。
